summary.en: PlayReader was a consumer web product that has since shut down.
summary.zh: PlayReader 是一個消費者網路產品，目前已經停止營運。

highlight.en: A Summer 2008 Y Combinator consumer startup that left no public product description and is no longer operating.
highlight.zh: 一家 2008 年夏季梯次的 Y Combinator 消費者新創公司，沒有留下公開的產品說明，現已不再營運。

summary.en: Post-booking revenue and capacity optimization software for airlines.
summary.zh: 為航空公司提供訂位後營收與運力最佳化的軟體。

highlight.en: Its Yana platform helps major carriers like Qantas, Iberia, and Emirates earn incremental revenue and cut costs while giving passengers more control.
highlight.zh: 其 Yana 平台協助 Qantas、Iberia、Emirates 等大型航空公司增加額外營收並降低成本，同時讓乘客握有更多掌控權。

summary.en: Heyzap was a mobile ad network helping users discover apps; acquired by Fyber for $45m in 2016.
summary.zh: Heyzap 是一個協助用戶探索 App 的行動廣告聯播網，於 2016 年被 Fyber 以 4,500 萬美元收購。

highlight.en: Its Android and iOS SDK provided advertising, publishing, mediation, and cross-promotion services to mobile developers worldwide.
highlight.zh: 其 Android 與 iOS 的 SDK 為全球行動開發者提供廣告、發行、中介與交叉推廣等服務。

summary.en: Foodoro was a marketplace for buying specialty food directly from artisanal makers.
summary.zh: Foodoro 是一個能直接向手工職人購買特色食品的市集平台。

highlight.en: Founded by food and tech enthusiasts to help people discover great food products and connect directly with the people who make them.
highlight.zh: 由一群熱愛美食與科技的人創立，協助人們發現優質食品，並與製作者直接建立連結。

summary.en: Cloudkick was a tool for managing, monitoring, and alerting across cloud servers.
summary.zh: Cloudkick 是一套用於管理、監控雲端伺服器並發出警示的工具。

highlight.en: It gave teams an easy monitoring solution and detailed health graphs for cloud servers on Rackspace Cloud and Amazon EC2.
highlight.zh: 它為團隊提供簡便的監控方案，並為 Rackspace Cloud 與 Amazon EC2 上的雲端伺服器提供詳細的健康狀態圖表。

summary.en: Skysheet was a browser-based spreadsheet application.
summary.zh: Skysheet 是一款基於瀏覽器的試算表應用程式。

highlight.en: A web-based spreadsheet that remained in stealth mode as of March 2009 and never publicly launched.
highlight.zh: 一款基於網頁的試算表，截至 2009 年 3 月仍處於隱形開發階段，從未公開上線。

summary.en: Divvyshot was a photo-sharing platform for sharing full-resolution photos with friends.
summary.zh: Divvyshot 是一個能與朋友分享原始解析度照片的相片分享平台。

highlight.en: It focused on letting users share photos at full resolution rather than the compressed versions common on rival services.
highlight.zh: 它的特色在於讓用戶以完整原始解析度分享照片，而非競品常見的壓縮版本。

summary.en: Echodio let users sync and stream their music across devices; acquired in 2009.
summary.zh: Echodio 讓用戶在各種裝置間同步並串流自己的音樂，於 2009 年被收購。

highlight.en: It offered an easy way to sync a music library across players, keep collections safe, and stream to a media center.
highlight.zh: 它提供一種簡便方式，可在各播放器間同步音樂庫、保護珍貴收藏，並串流至媒體中心。

summary.en: Picurio was web-based photo sharing and photo management software.
summary.zh: Picurio 是一套基於網頁的相片分享與相片管理軟體。

highlight.en: A consumer web tool combining photo sharing with management features for organizing personal photo collections.
highlight.zh: 一款消費者網頁工具，結合相片分享與管理功能，協助整理個人相片收藏。

summary.en: Voxli offered browser-based group voice chat for gamers and teams.
summary.zh: Voxli 為玩家與團隊提供基於瀏覽器的群組語音聊天服務。

highlight.en: Up to 200 people could voice chat at a persistent shareable URL with push-to-talk, without leaving the browser or setting up a server.
highlight.zh: 最多 200 人可透過固定且可分享的網址進行語音聊天並支援按鍵發話，無需離開瀏覽器或自行架設語音伺服器。

summary.en: PetaSales was a B2B startup that has since shut down.
summary.zh: PetaSales 是一家已停止營運的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A Winter 2009 Y Combinator B2B company with no surviving public description, now closed.
highlight.zh: 一家 2009 年冬季梯次的 Y Combinator B2B 公司，沒有留存的公開說明，現已關閉。

summary.en: reMail was an email search app for iPhone; acquired by Google in February 2010.
summary.zh: reMail 是一款 iPhone 上的電子郵件搜尋 App，於 2010 年 2 月被 Google 收購。

highlight.en: It downloaded all of a user's email to their iPhone to enable fast, comprehensive on-device email search.
highlight.zh: 它會將用戶的所有電子郵件下載到 iPhone 上，以實現快速且全面的裝置端郵件搜尋。

summary.en: Recurious operated thesixtyone, a community-driven discovery site for new indie music.
summary.zh: Recurious 經營 thesixtyone，一個由社群驅動、用於發掘獨立新音樂的網站。

highlight.en: Styled as a "Digg for music," listeners spent daily "hearts" to vote on songs, earning reputation, levels, and badges as their picks gained popularity.
highlight.zh: 它被形容為「音樂版的 Digg」，聽眾每天可用「愛心」為歌曲投票，當所選歌曲爆紅時便能累積聲望、升級並解鎖徽章。

summary.en: Wattvision provided sensors and software for tracking home energy use in real time.
summary.zh: Wattvision 提供感測器與軟體，用於即時追蹤家庭用電量。

highlight.en: Pitched as a "fitbit for your home," it shifted from selling a full sensor-and-software bundle to building software for hardware partners.
highlight.zh: 它被定位為「家庭版 fitbit」，並從販售完整的感測器與軟體套件，轉向為硬體合作夥伴開發軟體。

summary.en: Spaces Life was a real-estate startup that has since shut down.
summary.zh: Spaces Life 是一家已停止營運的房地產新創公司。

highlight.en: A Winter 2009 Y Combinator real-estate company with no surviving public description, now closed.
highlight.zh: 一家 2009 年冬季梯次的 Y Combinator 房地產公司，沒有留存的公開說明，現已關閉。

summary.en: Nambii was an online dating service with iPhone apps for flirting with nearby people.
summary.zh: Nambii 是一個線上交友服務，搭配 iPhone App 讓用戶與附近的人互送調情訊息。

highlight.en: Its iPhone apps let users send and receive flirts with people around them, an early take on proximity-based dating.
highlight.zh: 其 iPhone App 讓用戶與身邊的人互送調情訊息，是早期以地理鄰近為基礎的交友嘗試。

summary.en: Bump let people exchange contacts and photos by bumping phones; acquired by Google in 2013.
summary.zh: Bump 讓人們透過手機互碰來交換聯絡資訊與照片，於 2013 年被 Google 收購。

highlight.en: One of the all-time top mobile apps with 150M+ installs; its unreleased Photoroll app became the basis for Google Photos, which the team grew past 1B users.
highlight.zh: 它是史上最熱門的行動 App 之一，安裝量超過 1.5 億次；其未發行的 Photoroll App 後來成為 Google Photos 的基礎，團隊更將其用戶數推升至超過 10 億。

summary.en: Olark is easy-to-use live chat software for talking to customers on your website.
summary.zh: Olark 是一款易於使用的線上即時聊天軟體，讓你能在網站上與顧客對話。

highlight.en: Real-time visitor data such as location, login name, and cart contents lets businesses personalize every chat to drive sales and support.
highlight.zh: 登入名稱、地理位置與購物車內容等即時訪客資料，讓企業能個人化每一次對話，以促進銷售與客戶服務。

summary.en: HighlightCam automatically edited videos and photos into polished movies.
summary.zh: HighlightCam 能自動將影片與照片剪輯成精緻的影片。

highlight.en: Its mobile and desktop platform turned a user's favorite videos and pictures into professional-quality movie snapshots automatically.
highlight.zh: 其行動與桌面平台能自動將用戶最喜愛的影片與照片，轉化為專業品質的精華影片。

summary.en: RethinkDB is the open-source database for the realtime web.
summary.zh: RethinkDB 是專為即時網路打造的開源資料庫。

highlight.en: Instead of polling, developers tell it to continuously push updated query results to apps in realtime, with a powerful query language and parallelized architecture.
highlight.zh: 開發者無需輪詢，而是讓資料庫持續即時推送更新後的查詢結果，並搭配強大的查詢語言與高度平行化的架構。

summary.en: JobSpice was an easy online tool for creating and managing resumes.
summary.zh: JobSpice 是一款簡單易用的線上履歷製作與管理工具。

highlight.en: Changing styles, tailoring resumes for different employers, and exporting web and PDF versions took only a few clicks.
highlight.zh: 更換版型、為不同雇主量身打造履歷，以及輸出網頁與 PDF 版本，都只需幾次點擊即可完成。

summary.en: Lockitron made electronic locks you could control remotely or from your phone.
summary.zh: Lockitron 製造可透過遠端或手機控制的電子門鎖。

highlight.en: Built by Apigy, its device locked and unlocked deadbolt locks via remote control or a mobile device.
highlight.zh: 由 Apigy 打造，其裝置能透過遙控器或行動裝置開關門閂鎖。

summary.en: CarWoo was a stress-free, organized way to shop multiple dealers for a new car.
summary.zh: CarWoo 提供一種無壓力、有條理的方式，向多家經銷商比價購買新車。

highlight.en: It let buyers compare offers across dealerships in one organized place, helping hundreds of thousands of customers get a good deal on a new car.
highlight.zh: 它讓買家在一個有條理的平台上比較多家經銷商的報價，協助數十萬名顧客以好價格買到新車。

summary.en: FanChatter aggregated and amplified fan content for brands and media companies.
summary.zh: FanChatter 為品牌與媒體公司彙整並放大粉絲內容。

highlight.en: Customers from NBC Universal to individual bloggers used its tools to source, refine, and multiply voluntary social chatter as marketing material.
highlight.zh: 從 NBC Universal 到個人部落客等客戶，皆運用其工具來蒐集、篩選並擴散自發性的社群討論，作為行銷素材。

summary.en: RentHop is an apartment rental marketplace that helps renters find great apartments.
summary.zh: RentHop 是一個出租公寓市集平台，協助租屋者找到理想的公寓。

highlight.en: It ranks 100,000+ listings by freshness, accuracy, and manager responsiveness, and offers an "Appointments on Demand" map of brokers available to show units in real time.
highlight.zh: 它依新鮮度、準確性與管理者回應速度為超過 10 萬筆物件排名，並提供「即時預約看房」地圖，顯示可立即帶看的仲介位置。

summary.en: Listia is a mobile marketplace for trading used goods using credits instead of money.
summary.zh: Listia 是一個以點數而非金錢交易二手物品的行動市集平台。

highlight.en: Users auction items and bid with credits earned by signing up, giving away goods, and staying active, creating a money-free way to give and get free stuff.
highlight.zh: 用戶以拍賣方式出讓物品，並用註冊、贈物與保持活躍所賺取的點數競標，形成一種不需金錢的免費送物與得物方式。

summary.en: DailyBooth let users follow friends and update them in real time through photos.
summary.zh: DailyBooth 讓用戶透過照片即時追蹤朋友並分享近況。

highlight.en: It combined pictures with status updates so users could share their day visually and follow friends' lives in real time.
highlight.zh: 它將照片與狀態更新結合，讓用戶以視覺方式分享日常，並即時追蹤朋友的生活。

summary.en: Directed Edge delivered product recommendations to websites via a real-time API.
summary.zh: Directed Edge 透過即時 API 為各網站提供商品推薦服務。

highlight.en: It served Amazon-style "people who bought this also bought" recommendations in real time from existing purchase or click data, with bindings in several languages.
highlight.zh: 它能根據既有的購買或點擊資料，即時提供類似 Amazon 的「買了此商品的人也買了」推薦，並提供多種程式語言的串接介面。

summary.en: Plurchase was an online social shopping site with a social toolbar on retail pages.
summary.zh: Plurchase 是一個線上社交購物網站，會在零售頁面上加上社交工具列。

highlight.en: It let shoppers browse sites like Zappos while chatting with friends and seeing what they were viewing on other shopping sites in real time.
highlight.zh: 它讓購物者在瀏覽 Zappos 等網站的同時與朋友聊天，並即時看到朋友正在其他購物網站上瀏覽的內容。

summary.en: GraffitiGeo let users leave quick reviews and votes on restaurants and local spots.
summary.zh: GraffitiGeo 讓用戶對餐廳與在地店家留下快速評論與評分。

highlight.en: Like a condensed Yelp with FourSquare-style check-in points, it featured a heatmap so users could quickly spot a town's hottest places.
highlight.zh: 它像是精簡版的 Yelp，並帶有類似 FourSquare 的打卡積分機制，還提供熱點地圖，讓用戶快速找出城裡最熱門的地方。

summary.en: FlightCaster predicted flight delays hours before airlines notified passengers.
summary.zh: FlightCaster 能在航空公司通知乘客前數小時預測航班延誤。

highlight.en: Its patent-pending algorithm scoured 10 years of domestic flight data and real-time conditions to forecast a flight's probability of delay.
highlight.zh: 其申請專利中的演算法會分析十年的國內航班資料與即時狀況，以預測航班延誤的機率。

summary.en: NudgePad was a browser-based IDE for prototyping; the team joined Microsoft in 2014.
summary.zh: NudgePad 是一款基於瀏覽器的原型開發 IDE，團隊於 2014 年加入 Microsoft。

highlight.en: It removed setup pain like servers, deploys, version control, SSL, DNS, and APIs, letting anyone launch a hosted custom app in seconds, with every app reusable as a template.
highlight.zh: 它免除了伺服器、部署、版本控制、SSL、DNS 與 API 等設定上的麻煩，讓任何人都能在數秒內推出託管的客製化 App，且每個 App 都可作為範本重複使用。

summary.en: Lingt is a web-based platform that helps teachers create online speaking assignments.
summary.zh: Lingt 是一個基於網頁的平台，協助教師建立線上口說作業。

highlight.en: It empowers teachers to speak more with students by creating and managing online speaking assignments for use in the classroom.
highlight.zh: 它讓教師能建立並管理供課堂使用的線上口說作業，藉此與學生有更多口語互動。

summary.en: WakeMate made a wristband and app that woke users at the end of a REM cycle.
summary.zh: WakeMate 推出一款腕帶與 App，能在用戶 REM 週期結束時喚醒他們。

highlight.en: It used actigraphy via a wrist-worn unit to monitor motion, analyze sleep patterns and circadian rhythms, and time the phone's alarm for optimal waking.
highlight.zh: 它透過配戴於手腕的裝置以體動記錄技術監測動作，分析睡眠模式與生理時鐘，並調整手機鬧鐘以在最佳時機喚醒使用者。

summary.en: InstantQ was a platform for restaurants to send just-in-time promotions to customers.
summary.zh: InstantQ 是一個讓餐廳向顧客即時發送促銷的平台。

highlight.en: Launched in 2009 by Dana Levine, it enabled restaurants to distribute time-sensitive, just-in-time promotions directly to their customers.
highlight.zh: 由 Dana Levine 於 2009 年推出，它讓餐廳能直接向顧客發送具時效性的即時促銷。

summary.en: Tuxebo was a platform for renting things.
summary.zh: Tuxebo 是一個用於出租物品的平台。

highlight.en: A Summer 2009 Y Combinator startup focused on peer rental of physical things, now shut down.
highlight.zh: 一家 2009 年夏季梯次的 Y Combinator 新創公司，專注於實體物品的個人間出租，現已停止營運。

summary.en: RoboHR was a B2B startup that has since shut down.
summary.zh: RoboHR 是一家已停止營運的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A Summer 2009 Y Combinator B2B company with no surviving public description, now closed.
highlight.zh: 一家 2009 年夏季梯次的 Y Combinator B2B 公司，沒有留存的公開說明，現已關閉。

summary.en: AdThrow was a B2B startup that has since shut down.
summary.zh: AdThrow 是一家已停止營運的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A Summer 2009 Y Combinator B2B company with no surviving public description, now closed.
highlight.zh: 一家 2009 年夏季梯次的 Y Combinator B2B 公司，沒有留存的公開說明，現已關閉。

summary.en: Stackq was a B2B startup that has since shut down.
summary.zh: Stackq 是一家已停止營運的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A Summer 2009 Y Combinator B2B company with no surviving public description, now closed.
highlight.zh: 一家 2009 年夏季梯次的 Y Combinator B2B 公司，沒有留存的公開說明，現已關閉。

summary.en: OwnLocal automates marketing for SMBs through local media companies.
summary.zh: OwnLocal 透過在地媒體公司為中小企業自動化行銷。

highlight.en: It works with 3,300+ local media companies, helping newspapers, radio, and TV stations turn legacy advertisers into sophisticated local digital advertisers.
highlight.zh: 它與超過 3,300 家在地媒體公司合作，協助報社、廣播與電視台將傳統廣告客戶轉變為成熟的在地數位廣告主。

summary.en: All Screen (140Fire) connected users with engaging video content across the web.
summary.zh: All Screen（140Fire）在網路各處將用戶與吸引人的影片內容連結起來。

highlight.en: Operating as online video ad network 140Fire, it gave brands and agencies engagement and data tools to make video media buying far more effective.
highlight.zh: 它以線上影片廣告聯播網 140Fire 之名營運，為品牌與代理商提供互動與數據工具，讓影片媒體採購更為有效。

summary.en: Zencoder offered a cloud-based video encoding API and the open-source video.js player.
summary.zh: Zencoder 提供基於雲端的影片編碼 API 與開源播放器 video.js。

highlight.en: Part of Brightcove, its cloud service delivered high-quality live and on-demand encoding without paying for or scaling expensive hardware and software.
highlight.zh: 作為 Brightcove 的一部分，其雲端服務提供高品質的直播與隨選影片編碼，無需購買或擴充昂貴的硬體與軟體。

summary.en: Cue (formerly Greplin) surfaced useful information from a user's accounts at the right time.
summary.zh: Cue（前身為 Greplin）能在恰當時機，從用戶的各帳號中呈現有用的資訊。

highlight.en: It tied together email, contacts, and calendar so people could see their whole day at a glance or search across all their accounts at once.
highlight.zh: 它將電子郵件、聯絡人與行事曆整合在一起，讓人們能一眼掌握整天行程，或同時搜尋所有帳號中的內容。

summary.en: Answerly (InboxQ) helped businesses find and answer customer questions online.
summary.zh: Answerly（InboxQ）協助企業在線上找到並回答顧客的問題。

highlight.en: It made it easy to find people asking questions about a business, its products, or its industry, turning answers into a way to engage potential customers.
highlight.zh: 它讓企業能輕鬆找到正在詢問該公司、其產品或所屬產業問題的人，將回答轉化為吸引潛在顧客的方式。

summary.en: Bitplay built Meetings.io for effortless video meetings; acquired by Jive Software in 2013.
summary.zh: Bitplay 打造了 Meetings.io，提供輕鬆的視訊會議，於 2013 年被 Jive Software 收購。

highlight.en: With Meetings.io, anyone could create a tiny meeting-room link and meet face to face in the browser, with no sign-ups and reusable rooms people could drop in and out of.
highlight.zh: 透過 Meetings.io，任何人都能建立一個小巧的會議室連結，並在瀏覽器中面對面會談，無需註冊，會議室可重複使用，且讓人隨時加入或離開。

summary.en: Fabricly was an online marketplace for sourcing apparel manufacturers and materials.
summary.zh: Fabricly 是一個用於尋找服飾製造商與布料的線上市集平台。

highlight.en: It let brands, designers, and retailers research manufacturers and quickly bid out sourcing jobs to a wide network, reducing the risk of apparel sourcing.
highlight.zh: 它讓品牌、設計師與零售商能研究製造商，並快速將採購需求發包給廣大的供應網絡，降低服飾採購的風險。

summary.en: Embedly made embedding and previewing links from across the web simple.
summary.zh: Embedly 讓嵌入與預覽來自網路各處的連結變得簡單。

highlight.en: It helped publishers manage embed codes from 100+ sources like YouTube, Flickr, and Hulu, automatically converting links into embedded media on the fly.
highlight.zh: 它協助發行商管理來自 YouTube、Flickr、Hulu 等超過 100 個來源的嵌入碼，並即時自動將連結轉換為嵌入式媒體。

summary.en: LaunchHear was a way for bloggers to get early review copies of new products.
summary.zh: LaunchHear 是一種讓部落客取得新產品早期評測樣品的方式。

highlight.en: It aimed to make PR scale the way other startup processes do, by connecting new products with bloggers who could review them early.
highlight.zh: 它的目標是讓公關能像其他新創流程一樣具備規模化能力，方法是將新產品與能提早評測的部落客連結起來。

summary.en: Zenedy was a site for showcasing information about obscure topics from around the web.
summary.zh: Zenedy 是一個用來展示網路上各種冷門主題資訊的網站。

highlight.en: It started as a means to gather and present information about obscure, lesser-known topics drawn from across the web.
highlight.zh: 它最初的構想是蒐集並呈現來自網路各處、較不為人知的冷門主題資訊。

summary.en: Gamador was a social game developer that built games at a very rapid pace.
summary.zh: Gamador 是一家以極快速度開發遊戲的社交遊戲開發商。

highlight.en: It set itself apart by shipping quick, smart games in about a week each, and built Rankador, an analytics platform it likened to a "PageRank for social games."
highlight.zh: 它以約一週開發一款快速又巧妙的遊戲而與眾不同，並打造了分析平台 Rankador，自比為「社交遊戲版的 PageRank」。

summary.en: Movity offered real estate data visualization; sold to Trulia in December 2011.
summary.zh: Movity 提供房地產資料視覺化服務，於 2011 年 12 月售予 Trulia。

highlight.en: It surfaced neighborhood geodata such as crime, noise, and pricing to help home buyers make better decisions.
highlight.zh: 它呈現犯罪、噪音與房價等鄰里地理資料，協助購屋者做出更明智的決定。

summary.en: Etacts helped people maintain relationships and remember to stay in touch.
summary.zh: Etacts 協助人們維繫人脈關係，並記得與重要的人保持聯繫。

highlight.en: It showed who you'd lost touch with, let you set reminders to reconnect, and surfaced relevant context like recent emails and status updates.
highlight.zh: 它會顯示你已疏於聯絡的對象，讓你設定重新聯繫的提醒，並呈現近期往來郵件與狀態更新等相關脈絡。

summary.en: Data Marketplace helped people find, buy, and sell data online.
summary.zh: Data Marketplace 協助人們在線上尋找、購買與販售資料。

highlight.en: Buyers could post free data requests with optional deadlines and budgets, and aggregators responded with relevant data available for immediate purchase in formats like Excel, CSV, XML, and JSON.
highlight.zh: 買方可免費張貼附帶選填期限與預算的資料需求，資料彙整者則以相關資料回應，可立即購買並提供 Excel、CSV、XML、JSON 等格式。

summary.en: NewsLabs offered a platform to help traditional journalists adapt to the web.
summary.zh: NewsLabs 提供一個平台，協助傳統新聞工作者適應網路時代。

highlight.en: It gave "old school" journalists help with advertising, SEO, and other online issues they may not have dealt with before.
highlight.zh: 它為「傳統派」記者提供廣告、SEO 等以往可能未曾接觸過的網路相關協助。

summary.en: Newcope was a virtual goods commerce startup.
summary.zh: Newcope 是一家經營虛擬商品交易的新創公司。

highlight.en: A Winter 2010 Y Combinator consumer company focused on virtual goods commerce, now shut down.
highlight.zh: 一家 2010 年冬季梯次的 Y Combinator 消費者公司，專注於虛擬商品交易，現已停止營運。

summary.en: Infoharmoni was a data visualization company for the real-time social web.
summary.zh: Infoharmoni 是一家為即時社群網路提供資料視覺化的公司。

highlight.en: It visualized the real-time social web and aggregated content into a single view.
highlight.zh: 它將即時社群網路視覺化，並將內容彙整於單一視圖中。

summary.en: Notifo was a mobile app and platform for sending push notifications from any web service.
summary.zh: Notifo 是一款行動 App 與平台，可從任何網路服務發送推播通知。

highlight.en: It let any website or service easily create mobile notifications, starting with an iPhone app and planning Android and BlackBerry support.
highlight.zh: 它讓任何網站或服務都能輕鬆建立行動通知，先從 iPhone App 起步，並計劃支援 Android 與 BlackBerry。

summary.en: Mertado was an online social shopping platform built around communities.
summary.zh: Mertado 是一個圍繞社群打造的線上社交購物平台。

highlight.en: It let consumers discover and buy products from the online communities they frequently visit.
highlight.zh: 它讓消費者能從自己經常造訪的線上社群中發現並購買商品。

summary.en: Crocodoc let you embed PDFs, PowerPoints, and other documents into web and mobile apps.
summary.zh: Crocodoc 讓你能將 PDF、PowerPoint 及其他文件嵌入網頁與行動 App。

highlight.en: Built on HTML5 and CSS3, its document viewing and collaboration tech handled millions of uploads monthly for customers like Dropbox, LinkedIn, and SAP.
highlight.zh: 它建構於 HTML5 與 CSS3 之上，其文件檢視與協作技術每月處理數百萬份上傳檔案，客戶包括 Dropbox、LinkedIn 與 SAP。

summary.en: Creative Market is a marketplace for graphic design assets.
summary.zh: Creative Market 是一個販售平面設計素材的市集平台。

highlight.en: It offers ready-to-use design assets including fonts, graphics, templates, add-ons, photos, and themes from independent creators worldwide.
highlight.zh: 它提供來自全球獨立創作者的現成設計素材，包括字型、圖形、範本、外掛、照片與佈景主題。

summary.en: Nowmov delivered an endless stream of videos recommended to users' interests.
summary.zh: Nowmov 提供源源不絕的影片串流，依用戶興趣進行推薦。

highlight.en: It recommended videos based on a user's interests, friends, and what was trending around the world, served as a continuous stream.
highlight.zh: 它根據用戶的興趣、朋友以及全球正流行的趨勢推薦影片，並以連續串流的方式呈現。

summary.en: Fithub was a B2B startup that has since shut down.
summary.zh: Fithub 是一家已停止營運的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A Winter 2010 Y Combinator B2B company with no surviving public description, now closed.
highlight.zh: 一家 2010 年冬季梯次的 Y Combinator B2B 公司，沒有留存的公開說明，現已關閉。

summary.en: Mixed Media Labs was a consumer startup that has since shut down.
summary.zh: Mixed Media Labs 是一家已停止營運的消費者新創公司。

highlight.en: A Winter 2010 Y Combinator consumer company with no surviving public description, now closed.
highlight.zh: 一家 2010 年冬季梯次的 Y Combinator 消費者公司，沒有留存的公開說明，現已關閉。

summary.en: inDinero is a financial dashboard and finance team for small businesses.
summary.zh: inDinero 為小型企業提供財務儀表板與一站式財務團隊。

highlight.en: It pairs bookkeepers, accountants, and CPAs with real-time accounting software to help startups understand their financial health and maximize tax savings.
highlight.zh: 它將記帳人員、會計師與 CPA 與即時會計軟體結合，協助新創了解自身財務健康狀況並將節稅效益最大化。

summary.en: Docker is the world's leading software container platform.
summary.zh: Docker 是全球領先的軟體容器平台。

highlight.en: Developers use it to eliminate "works on my machine" problems, while operators and enterprises run isolated containers to ship Linux and Windows apps faster and more securely.
highlight.zh: 開發者用它消除「在我電腦上明明可以跑」的問題，維運與企業則透過隔離的容器，更快速且安全地交付 Linux 與 Windows 應用程式。

summary.en: Chartio was a cloud-based data exploration tool for building dashboards without SQL.
summary.zh: Chartio 是一款基於雲端的資料探索工具，無需 SQL 即可建立儀表板。

highlight.en: It let anyone connect their data and create powerful dashboards in minutes without any SQL knowledge.
highlight.zh: 它讓任何人都能在數分鐘內連接資料並建立強大的儀表板，且完全無需 SQL 知識。

summary.en: AeroFS was a secure enterprise file sync, share, and collaboration solution.
summary.zh: AeroFS 是一套安全的企業檔案同步、分享與協作解決方案。

highlight.en: It deployed on a company's own infrastructure with a Dropbox-like experience, keeping files protected by the customer's own security rather than a vendor's.
highlight.zh: 它部署於企業自有的基礎設施上，提供類似 Dropbox 的使用體驗，讓檔案受客戶自身的安全機制保護，而非仰賴供應商。

summary.en: DemandSphere provides SEO and content marketing intelligence.
summary.zh: DemandSphere 提供 SEO 與內容行銷情報。

highlight.en: Its DemandMetrics platform turns large volumes of SERP and market data into prioritized growth insights for ecommerce and programmatic SEO teams.
highlight.zh: 其 DemandMetrics 平台將大量的搜尋結果頁與市場資料轉化為具優先順序的成長洞察，供電商與程序化 SEO 團隊運用。

summary.en: ReadyForZero offered online tools for managing debt; acquired by Avant in 2015.
summary.zh: ReadyForZero 提供管理債務的線上工具，於 2015 年被 Avant 收購。

highlight.en: Users created payoff plans, made payments, and monitored credit via web or mobile, paying down over $250 million in debt on their own as of 2015.
highlight.zh: 用戶可透過網頁或行動裝置制定還款計畫、進行付款並監控信用，截至 2015 年，他們自主償還的債務已超過 2.5 億美元。

summary.en: Teevox made teevoxRemote, an app turning an iPhone or iPad into a Hulu and Netflix remote.
summary.zh: Teevox 推出 teevoxRemote，一款能將 iPhone 或 iPad 變成 Hulu 與 Netflix 遙控器的 App。

highlight.en: It enabled one-touch show selection, synchronized shared viewing with a friend, and play, pause, and volume control for Hulu and Netflix.
highlight.zh: 它支援一鍵選片、與朋友同步共看，以及 Hulu 與 Netflix 的播放、暫停與音量控制。

summary.en: Leftronic built web-based real-time business dashboards for monitoring key data.
summary.zh: Leftronic 打造基於網頁的即時商業儀表板，用於監控關鍵數據。

highlight.en: It pulled metrics from services like Google Analytics, Twitter, and Zendesk plus a simple custom API, with real-time dashboards designed for large screens.
highlight.zh: 它從 Google Analytics、Twitter、Zendesk 等服務以及一個簡易的自訂 API 擷取指標，並提供專為大螢幕設計的即時儀表板。

summary.en: The Recurse Center is a self-directed educational retreat for programmers.
summary.zh: Recurse Center 是一個讓程式設計師自主學習的進修營。

highlight.en: Free for participants, it funds itself through an integrated recruiting agency, welcoming programmers whether they've coded for three decades or three months.
highlight.zh: 它對參與者免費，並透過內建的人才招募業務維持營運，無論你已寫了三十年或三個月的程式碼都歡迎加入。

summary.en: WorkFlowy is a simple tool for organizing information as hierarchical lists.
summary.zh: WorkFlowy 是一款以階層式清單整理資訊的簡單工具。

highlight.en: People use its powerful hierarchical lists as a replacement for text editors and spreadsheets, capturing project plans, to-dos, notes, and brainstorms all day.
highlight.zh: 人們將其強大的階層式清單用來取代文字編輯器與試算表，整天記錄專案計畫、待辦事項、筆記與腦力激盪。

summary.en: AnyList is one app for stress-free shopping, cooking, and meal planning.
summary.zh: AnyList 是一款整合購物、烹飪與餐點規劃、讓人輕鬆無壓力的 App。

highlight.en: It makes it easy to create and share grocery lists, with changes showing up instantly across everyone's iOS and Android devices.
highlight.zh: 它讓人輕鬆建立並分享採購清單，任何變動都會即時同步顯示在所有人的 iOS 與 Android 裝置上。

summary.en: Rapportive added rich contact profiles directly inside your email inbox.
summary.zh: Rapportive 直接在你的電子郵件收件匣中加入豐富的聯絡人檔案。

highlight.en: It showed what contacts looked like, where they were based, and what they did, helping users build rapport and connect on LinkedIn from within the inbox.
highlight.zh: 它能顯示聯絡人的長相、所在地與職業，協助用戶在收件匣中建立交情並透過 LinkedIn 建立連結。

summary.en: Simperium built Simplenote and a platform for syncing content across people and devices.
summary.zh: Simperium 打造了 Simplenote，以及一個在人與裝置間同步內容的平台。

highlight.en: It built a syncing platform and released Simplenote as a showcase of the technology for keeping content in sync across devices.
highlight.zh: 它打造了一個同步平台，並推出 Simplenote 作為該技術的展示，用於在各裝置間保持內容同步。

summary.en: Chirply was a crowdsourced design marketplace for paper goods.
summary.zh: Chirply 是一個以群眾外包設計的紙製品市集平台。

highlight.en: A community of artists and design lovers collectively chose the best submitted designs, which were then made into greeting cards, notebooks, and wrapping paper.
highlight.zh: 由藝術家與設計愛好者組成的社群共同票選出最佳投稿設計，再製成賀卡、筆記本與包裝紙等商品。

summary.en: Habit Labs was a social health startup building a behavior-change platform called Budge.
summary.zh: Habit Labs 是一家社交健康新創公司，打造名為 Budge 的行為改變平台。

highlight.en: Formed from a merger of Contagion Health and Health Month, it built Budge around the idea of friends motivating each other: "I'll do x if you do y."
highlight.zh: 它由 Contagion Health 與 Health Month 合併而成，圍繞「朋友互相激勵」的理念打造 Budge，例如「你做到 y，我就做到 x」。

summary.en: PadMapper was a map-based apartment search engine with real-time filtering.
summary.zh: PadMapper 是一個以地圖為基礎、支援即時篩選的公寓搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: Its full-screen map loaded listings as users panned and zoomed, aggregating apartments from hundreds of sites including Craigslist and Apartments.com.
highlight.zh: 其全螢幕地圖會隨用戶平移與縮放載入物件，並彙整來自 Craigslist、Apartments.com 等數百個網站的公寓資訊。

summary.en: 1000Memories was an online place to organize, share, and discover old photos and memories.
summary.zh: 1000Memories 是一個整理、分享與發掘舊照片與回憶的線上空間。

highlight.en: Described as "the new shoebox for your old photos," it let people preserve old photos and memories and set up family trees.
highlight.zh: 它被形容為「存放舊照片的新鞋盒」，讓人們保存舊照片與回憶，並建立家族樹。

summary.en: GazeHawk provided low-cost eye tracking using ordinary webcams.
summary.zh: GazeHawk 利用一般網路攝影機提供低成本的眼動追蹤。

highlight.en: Its proprietary technology ran usability and ad-evaluation studies through standard webcams, enabling in-home eye tracking and fast, affordable large-scale studies.
highlight.zh: 其專有技術可透過標準網路攝影機進行可用性與廣告評估研究，實現居家眼動追蹤以及快速、平價的大規模研究。

summary.en: Upbeat was a software-powered next-generation PR agency.
summary.zh: Upbeat 是一家以軟體驅動的新世代公關公司。

highlight.en: Its team of engineers and PR pros connected the best stories to the best storytellers, managing outreach and follow-ups with real-time pitch analytics.
highlight.zh: 其工程師與公關專家團隊將最好的故事與最合適的說書人連結起來，並透過即時的提案分析管理媒體聯繫與後續追蹤。

summary.en: Opzi was a Q&A knowledge management platform for businesses.
summary.zh: Opzi 是一個面向企業的問答式知識管理平台。

highlight.en: Styled as a "Quora for the enterprise," the knowledge management platform later became the First Round Network.
highlight.zh: 它被形容為「企業版的 Quora」，這個知識管理平台後來演變成 First Round Network。

summary.en: Fanvibe let sports fans check into games to chat and trash-talk with friends.
summary.zh: Fanvibe 讓運動迷打卡進入賽事，與朋友邊看邊聊天、互相鬥嘴。

highlight.en: It offered a custom sports feed, game check-ins, real-time scores, and alerts across the NBA, NFL, MLB, NHL, college sports, and the English Premier League.
highlight.zh: 它提供客製化的運動動態、賽事打卡、即時比分與通知，涵蓋 NBA、NFL、MLB、NHL、大學運動與英格蘭超級足球聯賽。

summary.en: Fridge was a platform for lightweight, disposable single-serving social networks.
summary.zh: Fridge 是一個用於建立輕量、用完即棄的單一用途社交網路的平台。

highlight.en: Like "Tumblr for social networks," it let anyone create private shared spaces to socialize and share photos, videos, and events without being on Facebook.
highlight.zh: 它像是「社交網路版的 Tumblr」，讓任何人都能建立私密的共享空間來社交並分享照片、影片與活動，而無需使用 Facebook。

summary.en: TapZilla applied the daily-deal model to discounts on paid iOS apps.
summary.zh: TapZilla 將每日特賣模式套用在付費 iOS App 的折扣上。

highlight.en: Through TapZilla.com and AppRebates.com it gave out 25,000+ paid apps, pioneering a way to connect developers with users via daily featured app deals.
highlight.zh: 透過 TapZilla.com 與 AppRebates.com，它送出超過 2.5 萬款付費 App，開創了以每日精選 App 優惠來連結開發者與用戶的方式。

summary.en: Whereoscope was a smartphone app that let parents keep track of where their kids were.
summary.zh: Whereoscope 是一款智慧型手機 App，讓家長能掌握孩子的所在位置。

highlight.en: It used an intelligent sampling algorithm and geo-fencing to accurately locate kids, alerting parents when they arrived at school or left practice without draining the battery.
highlight.zh: 它運用智慧取樣演算法與地理圍欄技術精準定位孩子，並在孩子抵達學校或離開練習場時通知家長，同時不會耗盡電池。

summary.en: AdGrok was easy SEM software for Google AdWords; acquired by Twitter in 2011.
summary.zh: AdGrok 是一款用於 Google AdWords 的簡易搜尋行銷軟體，於 2011 年被 Twitter 收購。

highlight.en: It let business owners automate the process of choosing and bidding on keywords in Google AdWords.
highlight.zh: 它讓企業主能自動化處理在 Google AdWords 上挑選與競標關鍵字的流程。

summary.en: Koduco made iPad games focused on multiplayer collaboration on the same device.
summary.zh: Koduco 開發專注於同一裝置上多人協作的 iPad 遊戲。

highlight.en: Its games were built around several players collaborating together on a single shared iPad.
highlight.zh: 其遊戲圍繞著多名玩家在同一台共用 iPad 上協同合作的玩法打造。

summary.en: MessageParty was a local chat application.
summary.zh: MessageParty 是一款在地聊天應用程式。

highlight.en: A Summer 2010 Y Combinator consumer product focused on local chat, now shut down.
highlight.zh: 一款 2010 年夏季梯次的 Y Combinator 消費者產品，專注於在地聊天，現已停止營運。
